hwManualSmokeWinPrereq0: NVIDIA driver installed; status bar/codec tooltip shows GPU name (probeHwEncoders / nvidia-smi).
hwManualSmokeWinPrereq1: Bundled or userData ffmpeg with h264_nvenc/hevc_nvenc (npm run engines:doctor).
hwManualSmokeWinPrereq2: Short local H.264 1080p clip, 10–30 s (no DRM).
hwManualSmokeWinStep_nvenc_probe: Open a clip → Format rail → wait for probe: codec/HW hint shows NVENC or NVIDIA family.
hwManualSmokeWinStep_nvenc_manual: Pick h264_nvenc (or hevc_nvenc), balance preset, export 10 s to MP4 — file plays; ffmpeg log has -hwaccel cuda and h264_nvenc (or hevc_nvenc).
hwManualSmokeWinStep_nvenc_auto: Codec hw_auto: export the same segment — status bar shows [AUTO] and the HW codec; no silent libx264 fallback in stderr.
hwManualSmokeWinStep_nvenc_benchmark: Benchmark panel (15 s): NVENC row present; with nvidia-smi — GPU column; Recommended matches load expectations.
hwManualSmokeWinStep_nvenc_filters: Export with vf (e.g. hflip or crop): argv keeps hwupload_cuda before CPU filters (see Vitest nvenc argv smoke).
hwManualSmokeWinPass0: Output file is non-empty and plays in preview/external player.
hwManualSmokeWinPass1: No ERROR in userData/logs after export; ffmpeg exit code 0.
hwManualSmokeWinPass2: On failure — Support ZIP + ffmpeg command line from the log for the report.
hwManualSmokeLinuxPrereq0: Access to /dev/dri/renderD*; ffmpeg -hwaccels lists vaapi (engines:doctor with binaries in bin/).
hwManualSmokeLinuxPrereq1: Build: dev or pack:linux:dir; place engines in bin/ manually before release.
hwManualSmokeLinuxPrereq2: Same short H.264 clip; without discrete GPU — iGPU with VAAPI support.
hwManualSmokeLinuxStep_vaapi_probe: Open clip → probe: h264_vaapi / hevc_vaapi in codec list (or VAAPI hint in rail).
hwManualSmokeLinuxStep_vaapi_manual: Pick h264_vaapi manually, export 10 s — success; log: -hwaccel vaapi, -hwaccel_output_format vaapi, hwupload=derive_device=vaapi, h264_vaapi.
hwManualSmokeLinuxStep_vaapi_auto: hw_auto on H.264: VAAPI chosen before libx264; status bar shows HW codec.
hwManualSmokeLinuxStep_vaapi_av1: If ffmpeg build and GPU support av1_vaapi — short export again; else mark N/A in checklist.
hwManualSmokeLinuxStep_vaapi_benchmark: Benchmark on Linux: candidate table; VAAPI row without ffmpeg crash.
hwManualSmokeLinuxPass0: File on disk is valid (ffprobe -show_format ok).
hwManualSmokeLinuxPass1: No repeated Impossible to convert / Device creation failed in stderr.
hwManualSmokeLinuxPass2: On driver error — capture vainfo and first 30 stderr lines in journal J-NNN.
